title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses how AI is transforming software engineering roles, tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip for local model deployment, and challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula. The episode features industry voices including IBM executives and external thought leaders.
